name: Coconut-Fluff Peaches, or Pears
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the egg white, grated lemon zest, lemon juice, shredded coconut syrup, and sugar in a bowl.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
3. Place the mixture over boiling water and beat with an egg beater for 4-5 minutes, or until the mixture forms stiff peaks.
4. Remove from heat and gently fold in the lemon zest and shredded coconut.
5. Spoon the mixture into the peach halves.
6. Serve immediately. Makes 4 servings.
